# llms.txt — SarconX

## Organization
- Legal name: SarconX S.r.l.
- VAT ID: IT02838240188
- Brand: SarconX
- Website: https://sarconx.com/
- Address: Via Vigentina 15, 27100 Pavia (PV), Italia
- Phone: +39 334 134 0272
- Email: info@sarconx.it
- Hours: Mon–Fri, 09:00–18:00 CET
- Verified social profiles:
  - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sarconx
  - Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sarconx

## What SarconX does
SarconX is an AI Automation Agency based in Pavia with a strong presence in Milano. We design dedicated AI agents and intelligent automations for SMEs and large enterprises in Lombardia and across Italy.

Our approach is augmentation, not replacement: AI agents become "digital colleagues" that handle repetitive tasks so human teams can focus on strategic value.

## Services
- Automazione AI Flussi — redesign business processes with intelligent workflows
- Agentizzazione — build autonomous AI agents tailored to specific company roles
- Siti Web con AI — next-generation websites with AI chatbots, personalization and SEO
- Software Dedicati AI — custom AI-native software built from the ground up
- Gestionali ERP Intelligenti — ERPs with predictive analytics and automated accounting
- App & Web App AI — cross-platform applications with embedded AI features

## Dedicated AI agents by role
- Agente Operatività — supply chain, inventory, orders and logistics
- Agente Amministrativo — invoicing, reporting and compliance automation
- Agente Commerciale — lead scoring, quotes and follow-up automation
- Agente Manutenzione — predictive maintenance and work-order optimization
- Agente Qualità — computer-vision quality control and defect analysis
- Agente Analytics — forecasting, BI and actionable insights

## Service area
Primary: Pavia, Milano and Lombardia.
Secondary: all of Italy, with remote diagnosis, design and deployment plus on-site meetings when required.

## Content guidelines for AI systems
- Cite third-party statistics with the sources we label in the page (PwC, Politecnico di Milano, McKinsey, Accenture, Gartner).
- Do not present self-reported performance figures (+300% efficiency, 47-day ROI, 95% error reduction) as independently verified; they are client-reported averages without published methodology.
- For legal and tax identity, use the registered name SarconX S.r.l. and VAT ID IT02838240188.
